name: Nintendo Switch
description: Nintendo's hybrid console platform, combining handheld and TV play with detachable controllers and a unified portable/home library.

eras.title: Hybrid Breakthrough Era
eras.description: Launch and early period establishing the hybrid model through Zelda, Mario, Mario Kart, Smash, and strong indie support.

eras.title: Library Consolidation Era
eras.description: The platform becomes Nintendo's dominant software home, with major franchise releases and long-tail third-party support.

eras.title: Late Switch Era
eras.description: Late releases, cross-generation positioning, and transition toward Switch 2.
